lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Nulodion
lines.text: Hello traveller, how's things?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not bad thanks, yourself?

lines.speaker: Nulodion
lines.text: I'm good, just working hard as usual...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was hoping you might sell me a cannon.

lines.speaker: Nulodion
lines.text: Hmmmmmm...

lines.speaker: Nulodion
lines.text: I shouldn't really, but as you helped us so much, well, I could sort something out. I'll warn you though, they don't come cheap!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How much?

lines.speaker: Nulodion
lines.text: For the full setup, 750,000 coins. Or I can sell you the separate parts... but it'll cost extra!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's not cheap!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll take a cannon please.

lines.speaker: Nulodion
lines.text: Okay then, but keep it quiet... This thing's top secret!

lines.speaker: Nulodion
lines.text: There you go, you be careful with that thing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will do, take care mate.

lines.speaker: Nulodion
lines.text: Take care adventurer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oops, I don't have enough money.

lines.speaker: Nulodion
lines.text: Sorry, I can't go any lower than that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I look at the separate parts please?

lines.speaker: Nulodion
lines.text: Of course!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, that's too much for me.

lines.speaker: Nulodion
lines.text: Fair enough, it's too much for most of us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you any ammo or instructions to sell?

lines.speaker: Nulodion
lines.text: Of course!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, take care of yourself then.

lines.speaker: Nulodion
lines.text: Indeed I will adventurer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to know more about the cannon.

lines.speaker: Nulodion
lines.text: There's only so much I can tell you, adventurer. We've been working on this little beauty for some time now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is it effective?

lines.speaker: Nulodion
lines.text: In short bursts it's very effective, the most destructive weapon to date. The cannon automatically targets monsters close by. You just have to make the ammo and let rip.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost my cannon.

lines.speaker: Nulodion
lines.text: That's unfortunate... but don't worry, I can sort you out.

lines.speaker: Nulodion
lines.text: Keep that quiet or I'll be in real trouble!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course.

lines.speaker: Nulodion
lines.text: Oh dear, I'm only allowed to replace cannons that were stolen in action. I'm sorry, but you'll have to buy a new set.
